(SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS). ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS). JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D302/HK)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2017 Continued To Mar-14-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

(Tentative Ruling Part 2 Of 2)
Off Calendar Dec-19-2017 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-19-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Karen Yiu, Deputy Attorney General 510-879-1245 of the Office of the Attorney General for Defendant/opposing party.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TAX AND FEE ADMINISTATION'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Defendant California Department of Tax and Fee Administration's demurrer to all four causes of action in the first amended complaint filed by plaintiff Anastacio Martin Ruiz Arechiga is sustained without leave to amend as to all four causes of action. (see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/HK)
